name: snapshot_query
desc: Query the model snapshot (SQLite). Returns in <5ms, no Revit thread needed. Use after snapshot_export. Accepts structured queries (table + filters) or raw SQL. Available tables: elements, parameters, rooms, levels, grids, views, sheets, families, family_types, scope_boxes, filters, worksets. Join parameters to elements on element_id for parameter lookups.

parameters.name: sql
parameters.description: Raw SQL query. Use this for complex joins and aggregations. Tables: elements, parameters, rooms, levels, grids, views, sheets, families, family_types, scope_boxes, filters, worksets.

parameters.name: table
parameters.description: Table to query (alternative to raw SQL): elements, parameters, rooms, levels, grids, views, sheets, families, family_types

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: JSON object of column=value filters for structured query, e.g. {\

parameters.name: include_parameters
parameters.description: Comma-separated parameter names to join from the parameters table (only when table='elements')

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: Set to 'true' to get snapshot metadata instead of query results
